name: Madhav Makwana
label: Backend Engineer & AI Developer
summary: Final-year Engineering Physics student at Delhi Technological University with a Minor in Computer Science. Focused on GenAI systems that hold up in production - LLM gateways with cost and safety guardrails, multi-agent pipelines, and tuned RAG retrieval. Experienced in FastAPI, Docker, AWS, LangChain, Redis, and deploying agentic AI applications end to end.

work_experience.summary: Worked on player retention analytics and churn prediction for a driving simulator game.
highlights: Analyzed 10K+ gameplay sessions.
Built churn prediction models achieving AUC greater than 0.80.
Segmented players into low, medium and high-risk cohorts.
Provided retention insights for onboarding optimization.

projects.title: LLM Gateway — Secure, Cost-Aware Routing Proxy for LLM APIs
projects.summary: Production-grade LLM gateway with circuit-breaker routing, dual-layer caching, prompt injection defense, and per-key budget enforcement — deployed to AWS EC2.
highlights: Built an OpenAI-compatible gateway with circuit-breaker routing and automatic failover.
Blocked adversarial prompts via embedding-similarity injection detection.
Added dual-layer caching — Redis exact-match plus FAISS semantic match.
Enforced per-API-key budget caps; deployed via Docker Compose to AWS EC2.

projects.title: ResearchMind — Multi-Agent AI Research System
projects.summary: Production-grade multi-agent research assistant using FastAPI, LangChain, Groq API and agentic AI workflows.
highlights: Built a 4-step agentic workflow: Search → Scrape → Write → Critique.
Implemented JWT authentication and modular FastAPI backend.
Added Critic Chain for self-evaluation and hallucination reduction.
Integrated Prometheus monitoring and Docker deployment.
GitHub Repository: github.com/Maddy-MM/ai-research-system

projects.title: YTLens — RAG-Powered YouTube Q&A System
projects.summary: Question answering system over YouTube transcripts using Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
highlights: Built transcript ingestion and embedding pipeline.
Used FAISS vector database with HuggingFace embeddings.
Implemented MMR retrieval strategy.
Added authentication and persistent storage.
GitHub Repository: github.com/Maddy-MM/youtube-rag-assistant

other_projects.title: Car Price Prediction API
other_projects.summary: Production-grade ML API for real-time vehicle price prediction.
highlights: Built a FastAPI inference service serving real-time price predictions.
Integrated Redis caching to eliminate redundant inference calls.
Enforced JWT + API key auth with Prometheus/Grafana observability.
GitHub Repository: github.com/Maddy-MM/car-value-inference-api

other_projects.title: Movie Recommender System
other_projects.summary: Content-based movie recommender using metadata similarity, deployed as a Streamlit app.
highlights: Engineered tags from overview, genres, cast, and crew.
Vectorized text with TF-IDF and computed cosine similarity.
Fetched real-time posters via the TMDB API in a Streamlit UI.
GitHub Repository: github.com/Maddy-MM/movie-recommender-system

other_projects.title: SMS Spam Classifier
other_projects.summary: NLP-based classifier distinguishing spam from ham SMS messages in real time.
highlights: Engineered text and structural features (URLs, punctuation, uppercase ratio).
Compared Naive Bayes variants; selected BernoulliNB for best precision.
Achieved ~97% accuracy with a live Streamlit prediction interface.
GitHub Repository: github.com/Maddy-MM/sms-spam-classifier

other_projects.title: Credit Card Customer Churn Prediction (ANN)
other_projects.summary: Deep learning ANN model predicting bank customer churn from demographic and account data.
highlights: Preprocessed data with one-hot encoding and StandardScaler.
Built a 2-hidden-layer ANN with ReLU and Sigmoid output.
Achieved ~86% test accuracy with early stopping to prevent overfitting.
GitHub Repository: github.com/Maddy-MM/customer-churn-prediction

volunteer_experience.summary: Taught mathematics and science to underprivileged children.
highlights: Conducted 6+ teaching sessions.
Helped students improve academic understanding.

volunteer_experience.summary: Mentored students on academics and career planning.
highlights: Guided 4 students through one-on-one mentoring.

achievements.name: NPTEL Achievement
achievements.summary: Ranked among the top 5% in NPTEL Introduction to Database and featured in the Q4 toppers list.

achievements.name: Olympiad Achievements
achievements.summary: Qualified Level 2 in SOF Olympiads with notable international and Delhi rankings.

interests.name: TV Shows
interests.summary: A good TV show is usually how I switch off after a long day. Some favorites are Panchayat, The Sopranos, Monk, and The Mentalist.

interests.name: Reading
interests.summary: I enjoy reading whenever I get the chance, especially works by authors like Ruskin Bond and Satyajit Ray. I tend to gravitate toward stories that are simple, engaging, and stay with you long after you've finished them.

interests.name: Night Walks
interests.summary: I like taking long walks, especially when I need a break from screens or want to clear my head after a busy day.
